facebook.caption:
Under $10 a person. At a beach bar. In Phu Quoc.

Thom Beach Bar is pulling 4.5 stars across 362 reviews and your wallet barely notices. Cold drinks, sand underfoot, ocean in front of you. No resort markup. No dress code.

This is the kind of spot you stay two hours longer than planned.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sand, cold drink, $10 out the door. Thom Beach Bar delivers 4.5 stars without the price tag that usually comes with it. 362 people already know. Now you do.
